# Care Circle Global

> Care coordination and navigation hub that helps patients, families, and care coordinators organize health records, coordinate the care team, and stay ahead of crises.

Care Circle Global brings scattered medical records, medications, and care updates into one HIPAA-grade workspace so every family member, provider, and coordinator sees the same complete picture.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, how it works, and signup for patients, families, and care coordinators.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How Care Circle Global handles personal and health information.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms governing use of the Care Circle Global platform.
